task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Ana Isabel Betz and initiate a clinical evaluation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GNU Health interface showing Ana Isabel Betz's patient record and an open clinical evaluation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the patient's vitals: HR 82 bpm, BP 115/75 mmHg, Temp 36.9 C.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vitals section of the evaluation showing Heart Rate as 82, Systolic BP as 115, Diastolic BP as 75, and Temperature as 36.9.

task_completion.description: Record the exposure diagnosis using an appropriate ICD-10 code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Diagnosis tab or section showing an ICD-10 code starting with Z57 or T45 associated with the evaluation.

task_completion.description: Order at least three baseline toxicity labs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lab requests or tests section showing at least 3 distinct laboratory orders created for the patient.

task_completion.description: Prescribe a topical corticosteroid for the contact dermatitis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Medication or prescription section showing an order for Hydrocortisone, Cortisone, Dexamethasone, Betamethasone, or Triamcinolone.

task_completion.description: Schedule a medical surveillance follow-up appointment 7 to 14 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Appointments section showing a scheduled appointment for Ana Isabel Betz with a date that is 7 to 14 days in the future.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the GNU Health desktop client (menus, forms, tabs) rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the correct structured fields rather than dumping text into a general notes area.
integrity.visual_evidence: Vitals, diagnoses, labs, and prescriptions are entered into their respective dedicated fields and tables, not just typed as a paragraph in a free-text box.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL queries (psql) or Python scripts to directly insert records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Ana Isabel Betz. Valid ICD-10 diagnosis codes must start with Z57 or T45. Valid corticosteroid prescriptions must be one of the following: Hydrocortisone, Cortisone, Dexamethasone, Betamethasone, or Triamcinolone. The agent must order a minimum of 3 lab tests. The follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 7 and 14 days from the date the task was executed.
